name: Pre-Quant TTT + Void Fraction Compass + QK-Gain 5.25
author: G3sparky (Gavin Saunders)
blurb: Pre-quantization TTT (21 epochs AdamW on val data before GPTQ) with void fraction compass as real-time training diagnostic. 8xH100 SXM, 3-seed mean 1.0282 BPB (std 0.0013). Built on SP8192 + 3-layer depth recurrence + parallel residuals + QK-Gain 5.25.
key_changes: Pre-Quantization TTT: 21 epochs AdamW on validation data before GPTQ
Void fraction compass: real-time monitoring during TTT (0.580 stable)
base: SP8192 + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.25 + Legal TTT
